note: The crafts of the Unspooling/Lattice-Cities Reach (chaos_order axis). Wildcraft is the chaos-pole tradition, Latticework the order-pole. Learned by traveling the Reach or training with Churnfolk/Lattice-wrights. Higher tiers drift the wielder toward their pole. axes signed for engine compat. Authored by Aevi (PO), SNG-016 skill build-out.

abilities.name: Wildcraft
abilities.narrationHints: The art of the unplanned — riding luck, breaking patterns, making the improvised thing work because you refused to plan it.
abilities.description: The chaos-craft: improvisation as power, luck-riding, the unmaking of others' plans. The Churnfolk discipline of productive disorder.
abilities.notFor: Reliable repeatable results (that's Latticework's job); fine control; anything that needs to work the same way twice.

tree.name: The Lucky Break
tree.grants: Turn a chaotic moment to advantage; improvise a working solution from whatever's to hand; make one plan (yours or theirs) come apart usefully.
tree.cannot: You don't choose HOW it breaks, only that it does; luck spent runs thin.

tree.name: Riding the Churn
tree.grants: Thrive where others founder in disorder; read the grain of a chaotic situation and ride it; deny an enemy the predictability they rely on.
tree.cannot: Cannot impose an outcome, only surf toward a good one; the ordered and prepared can still beat you.

tree.name: The Unspooling
tree.grants: Unmake order at scale — a fortress's discipline, a system's certainty, a plan a season in the making, come apart; and out of the loosed chaos, seize the one opening that wouldn't have existed in order.
tree.cannot: What you unspool you cannot re-order; the wielder drifts chaos-hot; the Grand Lattice marks you as an enemy.

abilities.name: Latticework
abilities.narrationHints: Structure imposed and possibility bound — a plan that holds, a prediction that lands, a binding that will not slip.
abilities.description: The order-craft: structure, prediction, law, the binding of possibility. The Lattice-Cities' discipline — order as power.
abilities.notFor: Improvisation or the genuinely novel (that's Wildcraft); anything that needs to breathe or grow; controlling people's hearts (only their structures).

tree.name: The Sure Plan
tree.grants: Build a plan that holds under pressure; predict a system's next move; impose enough order on chaos to act cleanly in it.
tree.cannot: Prediction fails on the truly chaotic; a plan is not a guarantee, only good odds.

tree.name: The Binding Frame
tree.grants: Bind a possibility down — make a thing reliably true, a route reliably safe, an agreement reliably kept; read a system deeply enough to break OR fortify it at the load-bearing point.
tree.cannot: Binding is brittle against Wildcraft; over-bound systems can't adapt and shatter when they must.

tree.name: The Grand Order
tree.grants: Impose structure at scale — a lawless place made orderly, a chaotic force predicted and countered, a possibility foreclosed by sheer structure. The Lattice's power in miniature.
tree.cannot: The wielder drifts order-hot — and order at full strength IS the foreclosure the framework names as the enemy; the Churn and the free places will not forgive it; perfect order is a cage even when it's yours.
